claim: The identity held under a bounded numeric probe (n=1..1000).
scope: One arithmetic identity; bounded probe; not a general proof.
statement: For all n >= 1, sum_{k=1}^n k = n(n+1)/2.

evidence: n=1..1000: sum_{k} k == n(n+1)/2 for every n

uncertainty: bounded probe only; not a general proof for all n
